restaurants.name: Tataki - Immersive Asian Dining
restaurants.ambience: immersive dining experience with stylish decor and vibrant atmosphere with live music

attractions.name: Shri Mangeshi Temple
attractions.description: A beautifully preserved 18th-century temple dedicated to Lord Shiva, known for its serene atmosphere, lamp tower (Deepastambha), and traditional Goan temple architecture
source_files: Goa/Mohit_s Parents- All Inclusive Guide- Goa.pdf

attractions.name: Shanta Durga Temple
attractions.description: This grand temple complex dedicated to Goddess Shantadurga stands out for its red-and-white façade, landscaped gardens, and spacious courtyard. It represents harmony and calm
source_files: Goa/Mohit_s Parents- All Inclusive Guide- Goa.pdf

attractions.name: Tropical Spice Plantation
attractions.description: Walk through fragrant spice gardens filled with nutmeg, cinnamon, cardamom, and pepper vines while guides explain their uses in Indian cooking and Ayurveda
source_files: Goa/Mohit_s Parents- All Inclusive Guide- Goa.pdf

attractions.name: Fort Aguada
attractions.description: A 17th-century Portuguese fort overlooking the Arabian Sea, one of Goa's most scenic viewpoints. The lighthouse, crashing waves below, and wide open sky make it an ideal sunset stop
source_files: Goa/Mohit_s Parents- All Inclusive Guide- Goa.pdf

attractions.name: Basilica of Bom Jesus
attractions.description: A UNESCO-listed church housing the remains of St. Francis Xavier, this landmark is deeply significant and rich in colonial-era architecture
source_files: Goa/Mohit_s Parents- All Inclusive Guide- Goa.pdf
Goa/Goa All Inclusive Guide - Rashi and Rajnesh.pdf

attractions.name: Se Cathedral
attractions.description: One of Asia's largest churches, known for its vast interiors, Portuguese-Gothic style, and the famous Golden Bell. The wide open courtyard and shaded areas make it comfortable for a slow, unhurried visit
source_files: Goa/Mohit_s Parents- All Inclusive Guide- Goa.pdf

attractions.name: Fontainhas
attractions.description: Goa's Latin Quarter with its narrow lanes, pastel Portuguese houses, and balconies draped with bougainvillea. This area feels like a living museum, perfect for slow walks and photographs
source_files: Goa/Mohit_s Parents- All Inclusive Guide- Goa.pdf

attractions.name: Mario Miranda Gallery
attractions.description: A charming gallery showcasing the witty, nostalgic illustrations of Goa's most famous cartoonist. His art captures everyday Goan life with humour and warmth
source_files: Goa/Mohit_s Parents- All Inclusive Guide- Goa.pdf

attractions.name: Goa Science Centre and Planetarium
attractions.description: Science Centre, Planetarium & 3D Show
source_files: Goa/Goa All Inclusive Guide - Rashi and Rajnesh.pdf

attractions.name: Big Foot Museum
attractions.description: Museum experience
source_files: Goa/Goa All Inclusive Guide - Rashi and Rajnesh.pdf

attractions.name: Goa Chitra museum
attractions.description: Museum experience
source_files: Goa/Goa All Inclusive Guide - Rashi and Rajnesh.pdf

attractions.name: Reis Magos Fort
attractions.description: One of Goa's most beautifully restored forts, offering panoramic views of the Mandovi river and surrounding landscapes
source_files: Goa/Goa All Inclusive Guide - Rashi and Rajnesh.pdf

attractions.name: Chapora Fort
attractions.description: Popular landmark known for stunning architecture and panoramic views of the Arabian Sea, featured in Dil Chahta Hai
source_files: Goa/Goa All Inclusive Guide - Rashi and Rajnesh.pdf

attractions.name: Fontainhas Heritage Walk
attractions.description: Guided tour exploring Goa's architecture and culture
source_files: Goa/Goa All Inclusive Guide - Rashi and Rajnesh.pdf

attractions.name: Nauti Amigo Luxury Dinner Cruise
attractions.description: Premier dining experience with Bollywood music and dance performances, cruising on the Mandovi River
source_files: Goa/Goa All Inclusive Guide - Rashi and Rajnesh.pdf

attractions.name: Immaculate Conception Church
attractions.description: Church featured in bollywood movies like Josh, Aashiqui 2, Simba

attractions.name: Colva Beach
attractions.description: Water Sport Activities

attractions.name: Big Foot
attractions.description: Museum in south goa

attractions.name: Dona Paula Viewpoint
attractions.description: A scenic lookout offering sweeping views of the Arabian Sea and the meeting point of the Zuari river

attractions.name: Miramar Beach
attractions.description: A lively beach close to Panjim, ideal for a relaxed stroll, enjoying the breeze, and soaking in local Goan life

attractions.name: Goa Science Centre & Planetarium
attractions.description: An interactive and engaging space featuring science exhibits, a planetarium, and 3D shows
